title: Extensions (Free Upgrades) 🎁
description: Add new functions to any Type... even Apple's built-in ones!

slides.title: The Power of Extensions 🎁

quizData.question: What is the primary power of an `extension`?

options.text: To delete variables from a Struct.
To attach brand new Methods or Computed Properties to pre-existing Types (like Int or String) without touching their original source code.

quizData.explanation: Extensions are the perfect tool for expanding foundational blocks of the language to fit your exact needs.

slides.title: Protocol Extensions 📜🎁
See It in Action
slides.content: Look how cleanly we can extend Apple's `Double` to easily convert a number into currency format!
